modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.

short_description_text: Guidelines for creating content in Grackle Docs unclear

full_description_text:  
I am trying to understand what is allowed and not allowed when creating content in Grackle Docs. There seems to be some confusion regarding the specific guidelines or restrictions that apply. It would be helpful to have a clear outline of the content creation rules to avoid any issues.
